## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Notes for reviewers

Call out risky areas, migrations, or follow-up work.
